extension.summary: Continue Watching and browse lists from Trakt, AniList and Simkl
extension.description: Rabite Watch pulls your watch progress and lists from Trakt, AniList, and Simkl. Features: - Continue Watching with resume points aggregated from all services - Browse Watchlist / Watching / Watched / Dropped per service - Resume percentage stored per service and merged into a single smart resume point - Force-resume or jump to exact position when playing - No scrobbling - pure pull and browse addon
